title: swallenochloa tessellata
intro: Swallenochloa tessellata, also known as Tessellated Grass, is a type of grass species found in tropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including treating fever, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Swallenochloa tessellata is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
